name: Character
articlePrompt: Write an in-universe biographical article about a character. Cover early life/origin, notable achievements, personality, relationships, and legacy. Stay consistent with any facts present in the context.

name: Nation / Faction
articlePrompt: Write an in-universe encyclopedia article about a nation, civilization, or faction. Cover government, demographics, territory, history, culture, economy, and military. Stay consistent with existing lore.

name: Historical Event
articlePrompt: Write an in-universe encyclopedia article about a historical event. Cover background/causes, course of events (chronological), key figures, outcome, and long-term impact.

name: Timeline / Era
articlePrompt: Write an in-universe article describing an era or period of history as a narrative timeline. Use chronological subsections with approximate dates. Summarize the beginning and end of the period.

name: Location / Planet
articlePrompt: Write an in-universe encyclopedia article about a location (planet, city, region, or site). Cover geography, climate, population/demographics, government, economy, history, and notable features.

name: Species
articlePrompt: Write an in-universe encyclopedia article about a species or sapient race. Cover biology, physiology, society, culture, history, and relations with other species.

name: Technology / Object
articlePrompt: Write an in-universe encyclopedia article about a technology, artifact, or piece of equipment. Cover design, function, history of development, notable uses, and cultural significance.

name: Generic (no structure hint)
articlePrompt: Write a well-organized in-universe encyclopedia article about the requested topic. Choose appropriate sections based on the subject matter.
